## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:

## Branch

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feat/*`, `fix/*`, `chore/*`, `test/*`, `docs/*`)
- [ ] PR targets `main`

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Local tests pass (`cd server && npm test`)
- [ ] Build passes (`cd server && npm run build`)

## Deployment Safety

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Rollback plan noted (if risky)

## Notes for Reviewer

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Any follow-up work:
